title: BulletS2CPacket (S to C bullet sync) + server tick broadcast with render-distance culling
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L2010-2022 (BulletS2CPacket design: per-tick batch, render-distance culling, first-full-then-delta, client create/update/destroy)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1245-1256 (Sync strategy table: trigger, range, content, frequency, short-life guarantee)
acceptance_criteria: BulletS2CPacket record implements CustomPacketPayload with Codec<BulletS2CPacket> + StreamCodec
Packet fields: bullet ID list, positions (Vec3), directions (Vec3), velocities, visual style IDs, bullet sizes, shooter entity IDs
Server-side tick broadcast: BulletManager collects all active bullets each tick, packages into BulletS2CPacket
Render-distance culling: only bullets within player's render distance are included (per-player packet)
Packet sent via PacketDistributor to tracking players near bullet positions
Client handler stub registered (actual render object creation deferred to subtask 07)
Short-life bullet forced sync: bullets created and removed in same tick still get one full sync packet at tick end
completion_summary: Rewrote BulletS2CPacket as batch record with BulletEntry (id/pos/dir/texture/model/renderMode/size/shooterId) + StreamCodec; added BulletSyncService listening to LevelTickEvent.Post with per-player render-distance culling and previousTickIds short-life tracking
